tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb

recommended.song_name: The Way You Make Me Feel

content:
You Are Not Alone lyrics
tab by hudkins



[Verse]

[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
ANOTHER day has gone, I'm still all alone[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
How could this be you're not here with me[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
You never said goodbye, someone tell me why[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Did you have to go and leave my world so cold?[/tab]


[Refrain]

[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Everyday I sit and ask myself[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
How did love slip away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]
Something whispers in my ear and says[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
That you are not alone, for I am here with you[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Though you're far away, I am here to stay[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
But you are not alone, for I am here with you[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Though we're far apart, you're always in my heart[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]
But you are not alone[/tab]
  
[tab] [ch]G#m[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
'Lone, 'lone, why, 'lone[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
Just the other night, I thought I heard you cry[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Asking me to come and hold you in my arms[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]
I can hear your prayers, your burdens I will bear[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
But first I need your hand then forever can begin[/tab]


[Refrain]
   
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Everyday I sit and ask myself[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
How did love slip away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]
Something whispers in my ear and says[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
That you are not alone, for I am here with you[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Though you're far away, I am here to stay[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
But you are not alone, for I am here with you[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Though we're far apart, you're always in my heart[/tab]
                 
 
[tab]   [ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Oh whisper three words and I'll come runnin'[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Ab[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]C#m[/ch]
And I, and girl you know that I'll be there, I'll be there[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]
That you are not alone, for I am here with you[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
Though you're far away, I am here to stay[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]
But you are not alone, for I am here with you[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]
Though we're far apart, you're always in my heart[/tab]
                 
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]C#m[/ch]
You are not alone, for I am here with you[/tab]
(You are not alone)(I am here with you)
[tab]                   [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]
Though you're far away, I am here to stay[/tab]
(Though you're far away)(You and me)
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]C#m[/ch]
For you are not alone, for I am here with you[/tab]
(You are always in my heart)
[tab]                   [ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Though we're far apart, you're always in my heart[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]
you are not alone[/tab]
(not alone)

[tab]C-D-E(x5) [/tab]
